aiSettings.title: Settings
aiSettings.languageDesc: Select the display language. Changes take effect immediately.
aiSettings.modelConfigDesc: Supports OpenAI-compatible format. Connect to Google Gemini, DeepSeek, Moonshot, Ollama, and more.
aiSettings.maxOutputTokensHint: Controls the maximum length of a single response. Recommended: 8192.
aiSettings.thinkingModeDesc: When enabled, the model performs deep thinking before responding (generates reasoning_content). Only supported by some models.
aiSettings.thinkingBudgetHint: Limits the maximum tokens consumed during the thinking phase. Leave empty for no limit.
aiSettings.safetyHintGemini: Controls the Gemini model's sensitivity filter threshold.
aiSettings.safetyHintOther: Only effective when using Gemini models. Other models (GPT-4, DeepSeek, etc.) will automatically ignore this setting.
aiSettings.autoExtractionDesc: Control the knowledge graph auto-extraction behavior. You can still trigger extraction manually when disabled.
aiSettings.conversationExtractDesc: Automatically extract knowledge from conversations into the knowledge graph
aiSettings.documentExtractDesc: Automatically extract knowledge (settings, rules, etc.) when saving documents
aiSettings.chapterAnalysisDesc: Automatically analyze characters and plot after AI creates/modifies chapter drafts
aiSettings.modelRoutesDesc: Different task types can use different providers/models. Leave empty to use the active provider.
aiSettings.routeExtractionDesc: Knowledge graph / chapter analysis / character extraction
aiSettings.mustKeepOneConfig: You must keep at least one configuration.
aiSettings.confirmDeleteProvider: Are you sure you want to delete this configuration?

statusBar.clickToViewOverview: Click to view detailed project overview

mainLayout.searchIndexFailed: Search index build failed. Search may be degraded.

tutorial.step1Subtitle: Your AI long-form novel writing workbench
tutorial.step1Desc: NovelGenie is an AI-powered novel writing IDE. At its core is your AI writing assistant — it doesn't just write, it automatically manages memory, tracks plotlines, and maintains character states. All creation happens through conversation.
tutorial.step1Tip: Click the chat box in the Agent panel on the right, or press the message icon to start a conversation
tutorial.step2Desc: The AI assistant uses 'Skills' to understand how to write. Each project comes with a set of professional skills (outline building, draft expansion, editorial review, etc.). You can directly edit or create new skill templates to make the AI write in your style.
tutorial.step2Tip: File Tree → 98_技能配置 → subskill folder
tutorial.step3Subtitle: AI writes, you review — full control
tutorial.step3Desc: Tell the AI what to write, and it works like an editor — reading project settings, calling tools, generating content. All write operations (create, modify, delete files) require your approval. You can review each change line by line (diff), accepting or rejecting every modification.
tutorial.step3Tip: Agent panel on the right → Enter instructions → Review AI-submitted changes
tutorial.step4Subtitle: The AI never forgets your story
tutorial.step4Desc: NovelGenie automatically maintains a knowledge graph that stores your world settings organized by settings, rules, style, and user preferences. The AI references this knowledge during every writing session, ensuring story consistency. You can also manually add and edit knowledge nodes.
tutorial.step4Tip: The 'Knowledge Graph' button in the top toolbar
tutorial.step5Desc: The built-in timeline editor helps you manage the hierarchical structure of events, chapters, and volumes. Each event can be linked to foreshadowing, tracking the full lifecycle from 'planted' to 'developed' to 'resolved'.
tutorial.step5Tip: File Tree → 03_剧情大纲/outline.json to open the timeline view
tutorial.step6Desc: The '99_创作规范' folder contains style guides, character profile templates, project archive templates, and more. These templates guide the AI to generate content in your defined format and style. You can edit these files anytime to adjust the AI's output standards.

searchDiligence.warningBody: Search returned **{{count}} related files**. Per the due diligence principle:
searchDiligence.warningRule1: You **must read all {{count}} related files one by one** — no conclusions from just 1 file
searchDiligence.warningRule2: If a file references other files, trace those as well
searchDiligence.warningRule3: Only form conclusions after reading all related files
searchDiligence.singleFileHint: Tip: Only 1 related file. Read it and form a conclusion.
